title: Sense
text: Sense Type of visual feedback provided when the cursor moves over an enabled polygon. Sense = " None | Pointer | Polygon | Rollover " Value Description None No visual feedback is given during mouse movements. Pointer (Default) Mouse pointer changes into a hand shape. Polygon Polygons shown in outline. Rollover Polygons shown using the glyph or file specified in the Rollover Image Name property. The rollover extended trigger is also called for post-processing. Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(MAP) = "sense=polygon" Copy Applies To umap (Map) Related Links trigger rollover Interactive trigger for the umap widget that handles processing when a user moves the cursor into a map polygon and the Sense property has been set to rollover. When this happens, the rollover image demarcates the polygon. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
